findings.summary: Component count, BOM, power regulators correctly identified; NE555 timer (U2) not detected as oscillator/timer circuit; DisplayPort bridge interface (U1=5022505191) not detected in hdmi_dvi_interfaces

correct.description: 33 components, AMS1117-3.3 LDO (+5V→+3V3), two TPS61160A boost LED drivers with inductors, DisplayPort bridge chip (U1=5022505191), USB-C connector (J2) all correctly extracted and classified.

missed.description: U2=NE555 in SO-8 is used as a PWM oscillator for the backlight LEDs (PWM net connects to LEDC pins of the display bridge). The signal_analysis has no 'oscillator_circuits' or 'timer_circuits' detection for it. The NE555 is classified only as a generic IC with no circuit function identified.

U1 is a DisplayPort LVDS bridge IC with L0/L1/L2/L3 differential pairs (standard DisplayPort lanes) plus AUX channel. hdmi_dvi_interfaces returns empty even though differential pairs L0-L3 are correctly identified. This is a DisplayPort-specific interface that the detector does not handle.

findings.summary: CC_RX/CC_TX/RXREF falsely detected as UART interfaces; Q2 (2N7002) source_net reported as 'STM_HPD' instead of GND; SY7200AABC (U2) has null input_rail despite being connected to +5V; Voltage divid...

correct.description: 24k/4.7k voltage divider for RXREF (USB-C reference voltage) correctly detected with mid-point to STM32 ADC pin. USBLC6-4 identified as esd_ic protecting CC1/CC2/USB_P/USB_N. USB differential pair identified with ESD. STM32F072 correctly classified as IC on +3V3.

incorrect.description: bus_analysis reports three 'uart' entries for nets CC_RX, RXREF, CC_TX. These are USB-C CC-line signals for USB-PD communication (BMC-encoded on CC pins), not standard UART. RXREF is a reference voltage (ADC input for CC voltage measurement with a 24k/4.7k voltage divider). False positive detection driven by net name matching.

Q2 transistor analysis shows source_net='STM_HPD' and gate_net='STM_HPD', but in the schematic STM_HPD goes through R11 (1M gate resistor) to the gate, while the source connects to GND. The legacy .sch pin coordinate resolution is conflating the gate label net with the source pin.

U1 (SY7200AABC) correctly shows input_rail='+5V', but U2 (same part) reports input_rail=null. Both converters are in the same power topology. The custom library symbol (otter:SY7200AABC) likely prevents input rail resolution for U2.

findings.summary: 42 components parsed correctly with AMS1117-3.3 LDO, ESD protection, and decoupling analysis

correct.description: USBLC6-4 ESD protection correctly identified, AMS1117-3.3 detected as LDO, decoupling coverage observation for +5V (missing bypass/high-freq caps) is valid observation.

findings.summary: 2-layer PCB correctly analyzed: 33 footprints, all SMD front-side, GND/+3V3 copper zones, DFM standard tier with no violations

correct.description: Board dimensions 44.8x31.4mm, 330 track segments, 111 vias, routing complete. GND zone stitching with 78 vias detected. DFM min track 0.154mm, min drill 0.3mm, 0 violations. Courtyard overlaps (U2/C1, R6/C4, L2/C6) detected - these are real overlaps in the design.

findings.summary: 4-layer board correctly classified as 'advanced' DFM tier with 2 violations

correct.description: 65 footprints, 4 copper layers, routing complete. DFM: track spacing 0.119mm (below 0.127mm standard limit) and annular ring 0.1mm (below 0.125mm standard) both correctly flagged as advanced-tier violations. 13 courtyard overlaps detected.

findings.summary: 2-layer gerber set complete with correct layer identification and drill classification

correct.description: All 9 layers found (F/B Cu, Mask, Paste, SilkS, Edge.Cuts), PTH+NPTH drills present. Board 44.8x31.4mm, 111 vias at 0.3mm drill. Layer alignment verified. No missing required layers.

findings.summary: 4-layer gerber set with inner copper layers (In1.Cu, In2.Cu) correctly identified

correct.description: 11 layers found including In1.Cu and In2.Cu. Board 40.0x20.8mm, 175 vias at 0.4mm drill. Complete and aligned.
